SUBJECT: Action Required: Your FastComments Webhook Will Be Disabled Soon
DETAILS_LINE_ONE: This is an automated email. The following webhook integrations have not had a successful delivery in about a week - every attempt is failing:
DETAILS_LINE_TWO: They will be automatically disabled on <%= readableDisableDate %> unless a delivery succeeds before then. Queued events will be kept, but not delivered until you fix the endpoint and re-enable the webhook. You can review your webhooks here.
IN_APP_MESSAGE: One or more of your webhooks keep failing and will be disabled soon. Click to review.
